sonheyon.reason: Transliteration of General Sonhyeon; source and map positions are about 6 game units apart.

myosoryeong.reason: Transliteration of Exorcist Miaoryeong; positions are about 3 game units apart.

cheolhyeon.reason: The quest source uses Cheolhyeon at the Blacksmith Chulsan position; positions are about 5 game units apart.

gwaki.reason: Transliteration of Hunter Associate Gwakwi at the same position.

fa.reason: Buddhist Priest Fa is the closest same-name NPC, about 4 game units from the source position.

makho.reason: Transliteration of Stable-Keeper Makgo; positions are about 4 game units apart.

batu.reason: Same-name Soldier Batu; the quest article omits the negative sign from the Hotan X coordinate.

mampje.reason: Source typo/transliteration of Jewel Lapidary Mamoje at the same position.

markham.reason: Source typo/transliteration of Soldier Makhan; positions are about 7 game units apart.

hyeon.reason: Buddhist Priest Hyeon is the closest same-name NPC, about 5 game units from the source position.

manina.reason: Potion Merchant Manina is about 2 game units from the source position; malformed source HTML joined monster names to the giver.

salihap.reason: Stable-Keeper Salihap is the same named NPC; malformed source HTML joined monster names to the giver and its coordinate differs from the newer map.

leeguk.reason: Source spelling of Merchant Associate Leegeuk, referenced without coordinates in a related step.
